channel.title: No Fucks Given
channel.description: Darrell's unfiltered rant blog. No filter, no tact, no patience for bullshit.

item.title: He Just Announced a Pre-Crime Pardon for His Entire Orbit
item.description: Trump posting that he'll pardon everyone within 200 feet of the Oval Office isn't a joke. It's a confession. That's not mercy — that's a crime boss announcing terms.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: I'm Not Religious — But The U.S. Flexing on the Vatican Is Insane
item.description: You don't need religion to know flexing military power at the Vatican is reckless, stupid, and dangerous. This isn't diplomacy. It's chest-thumping bullshit.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: The Dollar Slipping and Oil Moving to Yen Should Scare the Hell Out of You
item.description: The U.S. dollar losing ground while oil starts trading in yen isn't a quirky market headline. It's a warning shot about American economic dominance.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: Trump's "Cease Fire" Didn't Even Last Half a Day — Because Of Course It Didn't
item.description: A cease fire that collapses in under 12 hours was never real. It was noise, optics, and another attempt to look in control without doing the actual work.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: Pam Bondi Ducking a Deposition Is Weak as Hell
item.description: She'll take every press hit available. But the second it's under oath? Gone. That's not strategy — that's cowardice with a microphone.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: Trump's Morning Truth Social Bullshit Is Exactly Why the 25th Exists
item.description: Threatening civilian infrastructure and posting like a rage-drunk maniac isn't strength. It's a public meltdown dressed up as policy.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: Trump Turned the Easter Egg Roll Into a Biden Autopen Rant in Front of Kids
item.description: Kids showed up for Easter eggs. Trump gave them a Biden grievance spiral, Iran talk, and the kind of unhinged adult garbage that should stay away from children.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: The Cult Has No Clothes
item.description: This isn't conservatism. It isn't populism. It's a personality cult — and the sooner people stop being polite about calling it that, the sooner we can have an honest conversation.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: Stop Calling It Patriotism
item.description: Flying a flag and loving your country are not the same thing. The people screaming the hardest about America are the most willing to burn down the things that make it worth defending.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: Accountability Died and Nobody Noticed
item.description: There was a time when getting caught lying ended careers. That time is over. We didn't fight it. We just quietly adjusted — and now we're acting surprised at the results.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)

item.title: The Media Isn't the Enemy — But Some of It Is Garbage
item.description: I'm not defending cable news. But 'enemy of the people' isn't a media critique — it's one of the first moves authoritarian governments make to delegitimize accountability.
item.author: darrell@nofucksgiven.org (Darrell)
